title: Master Prometheus Data Structures
description: Design optimal Prometheus histograms for accurate latency distribution tracking. Utilize Prometheus summaries effectively for different metric use cases. Avoid cardinality explosions in time-series databases by designing efficient metric labels and structures.
objectives: Design optimal Prometheus histograms for accurate latency distribution tracking.
Utilize Prometheus summaries effectively for different metric use cases.
Avoid cardinality explosions in time-series databases by designing efficient metric labels and structures.
